title: aster hispidus f. albidiflorus
intro: Aster hispidus f. albidiflorus, also known as the white-flowering hispid aster, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Aster hispidus f. albidiflorus include reducing fever, alleviating cough and sore throat, and treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and dysentery. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
